ab: maqtu cak su’uan simul cui?
en: A: Can I borrow money from you?

ab: na malau! pai’un qa su simul la cui?
en: B: Yes! How much do you need?

ab: minpungul cak madas si cui, maqtu’ asu pasimul zaku ki cui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ni amin cak madas cui.
en: B: I don’t have any money either!

ab: minpungul cak madas si cui, maqtu’ asu pasimul zaku ki cui?
ch: A:我忘記帶錢了，我可以跟你借錢嗎?
en: A: I forgot to bring money, can I borrow money from you?

ab: ni, opa ni’ang asu macauqis tangusang tu sinimulan na.
ch: B:不要，上次借的錢你都還沒還我。
en: B: No, you haven’t paid me back the money you borrowed last time.

ab: pasimulin cak huluc su?
en: A: Can I borrow your clothes?

ab: na malau, anaki su siza’.
en: B: Well, you take it yourself.

ab: pasimulin cak hung su?
en: A: Can I borrow your book?

ab: ispasimulin zaku Savi.
en: B: I lent it to Savi.

ab: pasimulin cak cuzinsa’ su?
ch: A:請借給我你的腳踏車好嗎?
en: A: Can I borrow your bicycle, please?

ab: u na malau, asa tu cuqaisun laqbing.
en: B: Okay, but you have to give it back to me tomorrow.

ab: qudananin ni’, minpungul cak madas talulung, pasimulin cak talulung su?
ch: A:下雨了，我沒有帶傘，借我傘好嗎?
en: A: It’s raining, I don’t have an umbrella, can you lend me your umbrella?

ab: muaz nak tas’a ka talulung, muskun ata talulungan ina!
ch: B: 我只有一把傘，我們一起撐吧!
en: B: I only have an umbrella, let’s stick together!

ab: maqa hung di ka’, sinpasimul su zaku tangusang nga’, cuqaisun ku su’uan.
ch: A:這是你上次借我的書，還給你。
en: A: This is the book you borrowed from me last time, I give it back to you.

ab: maqi haizang asa’un su sadu ka’, taqu’in cak.
ch: B:還想看什麼書都可以跟我說。
en: B:You can tell me what else you want to read.

ab: na laquaq cak macuqis si cui su i’?
en: A: When do I have to pay you back?

ab: ni tu makua, tudip pi haizin su cui ka’ na.
ch: B:沒關係，你有錢的時候再說。
en: B: It doesn’t matter, you can talk about it when you have money.

ab: laquaq qa cui cuqaisun su’u?
en: B: When are you going to pay me back?

ab: na cuqaisun ku laqbing su’uan.
en: A: I’ll return it to you tomorrow.

ab: laquaq asu macuqis hung zaku’an?
en: B: When are you going to return my book?

ab: tupi cuqaisunin zaku su’uan taqna?
ch: B:我昨天不是已經還你了嗎?
en: A: Didn’t I return it to you yesterday?

ab: cia Atul la pasimul su enpicu’ di?
en: A: Did Atul lend you this pen?

ab: u, ha’an cak ci’an ta simul, haip.
en: B: Yes, I borrowed it from him today.

ab: ma’aq qa enpicu’ di ka’ sinimul su ha’an Sai?
en: A: Did you borrow this pen from Sai?

ab: ni’, cia aipi tina binaliv.
en: B: No, this is what mom bought.

ab: uka’in na qacila, ina’in munha’an Sani ta simul li qacila.
en: A: We’re out of salt, let’s go borrow some from Sani.

ab: u, na mun’ita’ cak simul.
en: B: Okay, I’ll borrow it.

ab: tupa’i ka Puni tu cuqaisi ka cui nak.
en: B: Go tell Puni to give me back my money.

ab: piaq cia cui sinimul su’u’an?
en: A: How much does she owe you?
